# Senior AI Engineer

**Company:** TestCorp
**Location:** Berlin, Germany
**Remote Policy:** Hybrid
**Salary:** €70,000-€90,000/year
**Employment Type:** Full-time
**Seniority Level:** Senior
**Source:** https://www.linkedin.com/jobs/view/1234567890/

---

## Responsibilities
- Design and implement RAG pipelines for document processing
- Build and deploy LLM-powered applications
- Collaborate with product teams on AI feature development

---

## Must-Have Requirements
- Python
- LLM experience (OpenAI, Claude)
- RAG and vector databases
- Docker
- SQL

## Nice-to-Have Requirements
- Kubernetes
- TypeScript
- LangChain

---

## Benefits
- 30 vacation days
- Remote flexibility
- Learning budget
